description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design, featuring clean white and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a driveway with a parked car, a small patch of grass, and a tree, while the main entrance is slightly recessed and accessed by a short set of steps. Large rectangular windows are asymmetrically placed, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house has a garage integrated into the structure, and a side patio or terrace area is visible. The surrounding environment includes additional trees and a bench, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall appearance is sleek, functional, and contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and open space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, large windows, and a driveway with a car and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance with steps, a car, and landscaping with two trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side patio, and the arrangement of windows, with a tree and bench in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and a tree and bench nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a tree, with the main entrance partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a single door, accessed by steps, minimal overhang, and no decorative columns.
